prompt: Create a conference agenda infographic using the vertical timeline format from the given schedule table.
prompt_refined:
Generate a professional, visually appealing conference agenda infographic. The infographic must utilize a clear vertical timeline format, precisely extracting all schedule data from image 1.

On the far left, create a vertical time axis, clearly marking the time intervals from 7:30 AM to 6:30 PM, mirroring the structure in image 1. For each of the five days (Monday through Friday) listed horizontally at the top of image 1, create a distinct vertical section or column that aligns with the main time axis.

Populate each day's section with its corresponding event names and durations, as shown in image 1. Visually differentiate event types by applying a color scheme similar to that used in image 1 (e.g., light green for registration/breaks, light blue for preconference/sessions, darker blue for plenaries/blocks, and yellow/orange for talks/exhibits). Ensure the overall design effectively conveys the multi-day schedule in an easy-to-read, chronological vertical flow.
objects: Vertical time axis (7:30 AM - 6:30 PM) on the far left
Five distinct vertical columns labeled Monday through Friday at the top
Event name text within each day's section
Light green colored blocks for registration/breaks
Light blue colored blocks for preconference/sessions
Darker blue colored blocks for plenaries/blocks
"Conference Schedule for Five Working Days" title
